name: C3 (Exact Is Easier): 固定历史的精确leave-one-out反事实信用分配
content: cooperative LLM系统中interaction histories是observable text的deterministic functions (无hidden state) → 任何决策点可exact restore → 无参数LOO baseline + checkpoint restoration精确反事实 | 6 benchmarks (math reasoning + code generation) 2 model families + 2 multi-agent topologies → C3 consistently outperforms all baselines (含LEMON同源对比) | Exact solution  proves simpler, cheaper, more effective than all approximate alternatives. 三个diagnostic: credit fidelity / within-group variance / inter-agent influence = 第一个method-agnostic auditing tool
summary: 多Agent编排·精确信用分配 — 补'反事实信用分配'真缺口的精确化方向(与LEMON同源互补)
key_insights: cooperative LLM系统中interaction histories是observable text的deterministic functions (无hidden state) → 任何决策点可exact restore → 无参数LOO baseline + checkpoint restoration精确反事实
6 benchmarks (math reasoning + code generation) 2 model families + 2 multi-agent topologies → C3 consistently outperforms all baselines (含LEMON同源对比)

Exact solution  proves simpler, cheaper, more effective than all approximate alternatives. 三个diagnostic: credit fidelity / within-group variance / inter-agent influence = 第一个method-agnostic auditing tool
xihe_relevance: 曦和causal_cortex的C6反事实酶目前是启发式反事实。C3提供：①exact checkpoint restore(无需env access) ②method-agnostic audit(credit fidelity+variance+influence)——可作C6的精度校准参考 | 融合落点: C. 补充 → causal_cortex.credit_audit (三诊断: credit fidelity + within-group variance + inter-agent influence)
